data.title: Vanguard may offer crypto ETF access to its US brokerage clients
data.description: According to Solid Intel, Vanguard is exploring providing access to crypto ETFs to its U.S. brokerage clients.

data.title: Gate Web3 BountyDrop Launches New Fiamma and Cache Wallet Airdrop Events
data.description: According to an official announcement, Gate Web 3's BountyDrop airdrop campaign has launched for Fiamma and Cache Wallet. Users can participate in the BountyDrop section on the Gate Web 3 app's "Discover" page. Completing tasks will earn you a chance to share 500,000 MAMA and $15,000 in CACHE. BountyDrop is a dedicated coin-earning activity section within the Gate Web 3 "Discover" page. By completing simple tasks, users have a chance to win rewards or participate in a lottery to receive airdropped tokens. Additionally, Gate Web 3 officially announced two key initiatives: the launch of the high-performance Gate Layer second-layer network and optimizations to the GT token economy and ecosystem. This upgrade will address the pain points of high gas fees and slow confirmations through Layer 2 scaling technology, while strengthening GT's core position in the ecosystem and providing a more efficient, secure, and cost-effective Web 3 service experience for users worldwide. Gate Web 3 is the industry-leading multi-chain crypto wallet, connecting 100+ public chains, millions of assets, and tens of thousands of DApps in one place, unlocking a professional-grade Web 3 experience and providing the optimal solution for every Web 3 need.

data.title: LBank announces sponsorship partnership with Argentina national team and launches $100 million in benefits
data.description: LBank has officially partnered with the Argentine national team, becoming its first regional sponsor. The partnership runs until the 2026 FIFA World Cup, marking LBank's first partnership with a top-tier international sporting event. Coinciding with this partnership, LBank is also launching an enhanced bonus program with a total reward of $100 million: 1. Registration: Participate with zero barriers and receive $100; 2. Contract Enhanced Bonus: Users who transfer funds to their contract accounts will receive a 100% bonus, with no upper limit on individual rewards.

data.title: UK banks to pilot tokenized sterling deposits as lenders explore programmable payments: report
data.description:
Six major UK banks have begun a live pilot of tokenized sterling deposits, an industry effort led by UK Finance and backed by Quant, EY and Linklaters.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/372527/uk-banks-to-pilot-tokenized-sterling-deposits-as-lenders-explore-programmable-payments-report?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: S&P 500 Futures Rise Following Core PCE Price Index Release
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the S&P 500 futures saw an increase of 0.3% after the annual rate of the Core PCE Price Index was announced. Concurrently, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a short-term drop of over 10 points, currently standing at 98.33.

data.title: Fed's Barkin: Unsure whether the Fed will adjust its target policy rate
data.description: Fed's Barkin: It is uncertain whether the Fed will adjust its target policy rate. It must be noted that the Fed currently has little understanding of how inflation and unemployment will evolve. (Jinshi)

data.title: Noba Bank debuts strong in Stockholm, boosting Europe’s IPO crown
data.description:
Shares of Noba Bank Group AB exploded out of the gate on Nasdaq Stockholm on Friday, jumping 21% above offer price and throwing Sweden straight to the center of Europe’s IPO map. The stock opened at 84. 90 kronor, beating its set price of 70 kronor, and brought in 7. 6 billion kronor (around $804 million) for […]

data.title: WLFI Turns to Aggressive Supply Cuts as Token Pressure Mounts
data.description:
Instead of keeping treasury fees idle, WLFI will now recycle them into open-market purchases on Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Solana.
source: https://coindoo.com/wlfi-turns-to-aggressive-supply-cuts-as-token-pressure-mounts/

data.title: Binance Finance, One-Click Token Purchase, Flash Swap, Leverage, and Futures Launch Mira (MIRA)
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance has launched Mira (MIRA) on its wealth management, one-click coin purchase, flash swap, leverage, and contract platforms. Specifically, the MIRA principal-guaranteed earning current product will be launched on the Binance platform and open for subscription at 20:00 on September 26, 2025 (GMT+8); Binance will also launch MIRA 1-75x U-margin perpetual contracts at 20:00 on September 26, 2025 (GMT+8); Binance's safe deposit and isolated margin trading platforms will add MIRA as a new borrowable asset at 20:00 on September 26, 2025 (GMT+8), as well as MIRA/USDT and MIRA/USDC full-position and isolated margin trading pairs.

data.title: Digital Horror in Minnesota: Brothers Kidnap Family to Steal $8 Million in Crypto.
data.description:
Two Garcia brothers kidnapped a family in Minnesota and stole $8M in crypto. The case, involving armed threats and coercion, underlines the rise of digital asset crime in the US.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/crypto/digital-horror-in-minnesota-brothers-kidnap-family-to-steal-8-million-in-crypto/

data.title: Market Sentiment Stabilizes After Recent Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain data analyst Murphy noted that following the market's rapid decline yesterday, the Call Premium Paid and Put Premium Paid have nearly returned to equilibrium. The premium for buying call options slightly exceeds that for put options. While this does not guarantee an immediate rebound, it reduces the likelihood of further accelerated declines in the short term. This indicates that market sentiment has not continued to deteriorate into a more pessimistic outlook.

Huang Licheng, known as "Big Brother," opened a 10x long position on XPL worth $2.333 million, currently suffering a $171,000 floating loss. 8. Binance Alpha will list Falcon Finance (FF) on September 29. 9. Tom Lee: If the Fed only cuts interest rates once this year, the market will remain strong; 10. Forward Industries SOL's holdings currently have a floating loss of over US$245 million.

data.title: LBank announces sponsorship partnership with Argentina national team and launches $100 million in benefits
data.description: According to official news, LBank has officially entered into a partnership with the Argentine national team, becoming its regional sponsor through the 2026 FIFA World Cup. This marks LBank's first partnership with a top international sporting event and marks a key step in its globalization strategy. Simultaneously, LBank has launched an enhanced bonus program with a total reward of $100 million: 1. Welcome Gift: Participate in the program with zero barriers to entry and receive $100; 2. 100% Enhanced Contract Bonus: Users who transfer funds to their contract accounts will receive a 100% enhanced bonus, with no upper limit on individual rewards.

data.title: PIVX Weekly Pulse (Sept 19th, 2025 — Sept 25th, 2025)
data.description:
PIVX Weekly Pulse (Sept 19th, 2025 — Sept 25th, 2025)Want to know what’s happening with PIVX? Our weekly recap brings you key market insights and the most important community updates, all in one place. Market PulseMasternode Count: The sharp change in market conditions appears to have taken a toll on PIVX masternodes. The number of active PIVX Masternodes saw a steep decline this week, falling from 2,011 to 1,849. This decrease comes amidst a significant downturn across the broader crypto market, with many top-tier assets recording double-digit losses
source: https://medium.com/pivx/pivx-weekly-pulse-sept-19th-2025-sept-25th-2025-60fcf5d44e0d?source=rss----430d9242e45e---4

data.title: Mira Foundation: MIRA registration and redemption now online
data.description: Mira Foundation announced that registration and redemption of MIRA tokens are now live. Eligible community members must register and complete verification to claim their tokens. Eligibility for this airdrop will be determined by a snapshot taken at 00:00 UTC on September 22, 2025. Participants for the initial airdrop include early ecosystem users, node delegates (Drops 1 and 2), Kaito Yappers, Kaito ecosystem stakers (qualified $KAITO stakers in Season 1 will receive 0.20% of the token supply), recognized Discord community members, and OKX Quest participants. Registration deadline: October 2, 2025, 11:00 AM (UTC); redemption deadline: October 26, 2025, 12:00 PM (UTC).

data.title: Lido's proposal on LDO repurchase currently has 100% support, with the deadline being September 30th.
data.description: The Snapshot page indicates that Lido has launched a proposal called NEST, a modular system for using stETH to repurchase LDO from the treasury. Voting is currently underway, with 100% support and a deadline of September 30th. The first operational version of this proposal is expected to launch in December 2025, paving the way for future repurchase mechanisms. NEST is a modular extension of STONKS designed to simplify the exchange of stETH for LDO, with LDO automatically sent to the Lido DAO treasury. The proposal only covers the development of NEST; activation requires a separate on-chain vote. If the proposal passes, further research, timelines, and detailed design will be conducted. Core contributors will further discuss the repurchase mechanism.

data.title: Vanguard Prepares to Offer Cryptocurrency ETF Investments on Brokerage Platform
data.description: According to PANews, Vanguard, the world's second-largest asset management company, is preparing to allow its brokerage platform clients to invest in cryptocurrency ETFs. Anonymous sources have revealed that the company is responding to strong client demand for digital assets and the evolving regulatory landscape. While Vanguard does not plan to launch its own products like BlackRock, it is considering enabling brokerage clients to invest in select third-party cryptocurrency ETFs. However, the timeline for this decision and the specific products to be offered remain unclear.

data.title: Aster compensates traders for the XPL perp incident in USDT
data.description:

The incident reportedly unfolded on Thursday, which prompted a response from the platform assuring customers that all affected traders would be reimbursed. In a post on X early Friday, […]
